resources.string: Just tell Gisti what you need
Add items, set reminders, plan your week — all through AI chat.
Photo, PDF, voice, text, or link — AI turns it into a clear checklist.
Per-item reminders, recurring schedules, and a calendar view.
Phone, tablet, or browser — same checklists, same AI.
What do you want to organize?
How do you prefer your lists?
Toggle off what you don't need
Tap items to check them off
Get reminded at the right time
Long press on your home screen
Drag the widget to your home screen
Create your first checklist or let AI build one from any text, photo, or document.
Ask Gisti to add, remind, or plan…
Generate fresh ideas for items I could add to this checklist.
Summarize my progress on this checklist.
Suggest more items for this checklist.
Check back later for news and tips
Check back later for pre-made checklists.
What would you like to analyze?
Paste meeting notes, articles, instructions — anything you want to turn into a checklist...
Not enough credits. Get more to continue.
Microphone access was denied. Please grant permission to record voice.
Microphone access is disabled. Please enable it in Settings to record voice.
Record a voice message to analyze
Update existing items with AI results
Create a separate fill for this analysis
This checklist couldn't be opened — it may be incomplete or corrupted. You can delete it to remove it from your list.
Delete this checklist? This can't be undone.
No items in this checklist.\nTap + to add items.
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"? This action cannot be undone.
No fills yet.\nCreate a new fill to start checking items.
Create a fill to start checking items off your list. Each fill tracks your progress separately.
Photo, PDF, link or text → AI fills it
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"? This action cannot be undone.
Add a note about this item...
Free plan: 3 attachments per item. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited.
You've reached the maximum of %1$d checklists on the free plan. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited checklists.
You've reached the maximum of %1$d fills for this checklist. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited fills.
Your premium access is valid until
Your credits refill daily at 12:00 CET
🎉 Welcome to Premium! Enjoy unlimited access.
Get unlimited access to all features
%1$d-day free trial, then %2$s/month. Auto-renews. Cancel anytime.
%1$d-day free trial, then %2$s/year. Auto-renews. Cancel anytime.
%1$d-day free trial, then %2$s/month. Auto-renews. Cancel anytime.
Unable to load subscription options.\nPlease check your connection and try again.
Tell us what's on your mind
Would you mind leaving a review?\nIt helps us a lot!
Notifications for checklist reminders and deadlines
Without this, reminders may be delayed by a few minutes.
Reminders may be delayed by a few minutes
Allow Gisti to notify you when your reminder is due so you never miss an important checklist.
Get notified at the exact time you set
See your checklist name and remaining items
Tap the notification to jump right in
Uncheck all items when reminder repeats

We use analytics to improve the app and measure ad effectiveness. Your data helps us understand how features are used and optimize your experience.\n\nDo you consent to data collection for analytics and advertising purposes?
Create a checklist in the app first, then come back to configure the widget.
Add task text — e.g. "call mom every Sunday at 12"
Preview screens for App Store/Play Store
Preview the 8 smart repeat presets sheet
Force show CSAT bottom sheet for testing
Open the new interactive onboarding flow
Browse all app screens (for screenshot tests)
4 checklists, free user — shows upsell button
Edit first seeded checklist — requires seed
All fills for a checklist — requires seed
Analyze linked to first seeded checklist
Subscription / trial screen (variant from Remote Config)
Subscriptions and full features live in the mobile app. Install Gisti on your phone for unlimited checklists, AI fills, exports, and reminders.
We are cooking it. Stay tuned.
Turn any photo, voice memo, or PDF into a smart checklist — instantly.
Unlock Gisti Pro — 300 AI requests every day, unlimited checklists and recurring reminders.
Your free trial ends and your Pro subscription begins.
Create from photos, voice & PDF. Plan your week. AI without daily limits. Cancel anytime.
Snap a fridge, a recipe, a whiteboard.
Talk it out. Gisti structures it.
Articles and posts, distilled into steps.
Refilled daily. Plan a week of trips, recipes, and projects.
No 4-checklist cap. Build as many as you need.
Reuse the same checklist across trips, sessions, projects.
Daily, weekly, custom — schedule as many as you want.
Same AI tools — Pro removes the limits. Try Pro free for %1$d days.
Free users can have 1 weekly checklist. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited weekly checklists.
Free users can have 1 active reminder. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited reminders on checklists and items.
Enjoy your day or create a new task
Great job! You've completed everything scheduled for today.
Create your first checklist to get started.
Create a checklist with reminders to see your week here.
No checklist specified — will use the first one.
I didn't catch that. Try «add milk to shopping» or «remind me on Friday at 6pm».
Add, find, delete, mark done, simple reminders. Processed on your device, no credits.
Bulk operations or ambiguous wording. AI helps us understand exactly what you mean.
«What should I do this week?», planning, summaries. Full AI reasoning.
Write actions (add / delete / set) always show a preview. Credits are charged when we figure out what you meant, not when you tap Apply.
All queries skip the local router and go straight to the advanced model (3 credits per reply).
This action requires a Premium subscription.
Hi! I can help you manage your checklists. Try «add milk to shopping» or «remind me on Friday at 6pm».
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Something went wrong applying the change. Please try again.
I understood your intent but couldn't extract the details. Please try again with more specifics.
No checklists found. Create one first.
Could not load fill for checklist «%1$s».
Not enough credits for AI assist. Refill or upgrade to Premium.
AI couldn't respond. Please try again.
Helps improve future answers. We'll send this question + reply along with your feedback.
What went wrong? What was missing?
No files attached. Please pick a file first.
Attachment limit reached. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited attachments.
No checklist items could be extracted from «%1$s».
Could not analyze «%1$s». Please try again.
Could not save «%1$s». Check storage permissions.
Recording too short. Hold the mic button longer.
Couldn't hear anything in the recording. Try again.
Couldn't transcribe the recording. Check connection and try again.
Describe what to do with the attachment…

Talk to your checklists in natural language. Add items, set reminders, attach photos, record voice — the assistant will figure out what you mean. Tap the clip to attach a file, hold the mic to record voice.
Create a checklist «Shopping» with milk, bread, butter
Remind me at 6 PM about milk
Move all reminders from Tuesday to Wednesday
Attach this to milk in shopping (with a photo)
Create a checklist from this photo / PDF / text
Select a checklist to view details
Sign in with Google to access your lists from any device
Sign in with Google to unlock AI features
Sign in with Google to use AI features
I completed several steps but hit the per-request limit. Tell me what else you need.
Hi! I'm Gisti. Ask me anything about your lists.
Tap the circle to check off an item
Tap any item to edit it
Use the + button to add your own
